question: Show total revenue by city.
final_sql: SELECT T1.city, SUM(T4.unit_price) FROM customers AS T1 JOIN orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN order_items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id JOIN products AS T4 ON T3.product_id = T4.product_id GROUP BY T1.city
summary: Bengaluru generated the highest revenue at $2000, followed by Chennai ($140) and Mumbai ($100).

trace.sql: SELECT T1.city, SUM(T3.unit_price) FROM customers AS T1 JOIN orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN order_items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id JOIN products AS T4 ON T3.product_id = T4.product_id GROUP BY T1.city
